# Eaglercraft2 by Ck Gaming Studios

> A modern, independent web-based game engine and client developed by a solo developer. 
> Distinct from legacy Eaglercraft 1.5.2/1.8.8.

## Core Project Details
- **Project Name:** Eaglercraft2
- **Developer:** Ck Gaming Studios (Solo Developer)
- **Engine:** ELGE (Eaglercraft2 Low-End Game Engine)
- **Renderer:** Victus Renderer
- **Tech Stack:** React, Vite, TypeScript, TeaVM (Java to JS/WASM)

## Latest Version (Pre-Release 0.1.5)
- **New Features:** Relay World Sharing System (Internal/External), Connection Checker 1.0.
- **Official Subreddit:** https://www.reddit.com/r/Eaglercraft02/
- **Official Assets:** https://assets-ckgamingstudios.pages.dev/
